title: Learn Driver Licensing lesson by lesson.
description: Study SPSV driver licensing in focused lessons, practise original FREE_NOW questions, review mistakes, and finish with a mixed 30-question test.

lessons.title: Authorities and Compliance
lessons.intro: Learn who controls, checks, and issues SPSV-related permissions.
lessons.memoryTrick: Garda for driver licence, NTA for vehicle/industry framework, ComReg for radio.
commonMistakes: Mixing NTA, Garda, RSA and NDLS roles
Assuming every transport matter goes to the RSA

lessons.title: Application Process
lessons.intro: Understand where applications go, what forms are needed, and what happens after passing the test.
lessons.memoryTrick: Test first, Garda process next, card/licence after approval.
commonMistakes: Thinking a conditional offer is a licence
Sending PSV forms to the wrong body

lessons.title: Vehicle and Licence Types
lessons.intro: Learn what different SPSV types can do and when fares may be agreed in advance.
lessons.memoryTrick: Taxi can ply; hackney is booked; limousine is special/private.
commonMistakes: Assuming wheelchair accessible means a different driver licence rule

lessons.title: Driver Identification
lessons.intro: Learn what the driver cards, colours, stickers and displayed information mean.
lessons.memoryTrick: Cards and stickers tell passengers what licence and area the driver has.
commonMistakes: Confusing vehicle discs with driver ID

lessons.title: Bus Lanes and Pickups
lessons.intro: Know which SPSVs can use bus lanes and where different vehicles may pick up.
lessons.memoryTrick: Taxis have public hire privileges; hackneys are booking-based.
commonMistakes: Assuming every SPSV can use every bus lane
Confusing normal bus lanes with contra-flow bus lanes

lessons.title: Licence Validity and Renewal
lessons.intro: Learn expiry, renewal timing, lost cards, expired licences and transfer rules.
lessons.memoryTrick: Licence problems must be reported or renewed early; do not ignore cards or expiry dates.
commonMistakes: Reporting smart-card issues to the wrong place

lessons.title: Penalties and Offences
lessons.intro: Practise the penalty questions connected to operating or displaying identification incorrectly.
lessons.memoryTrick: No valid licence or forged display equals a serious penalty question.
commonMistakes: Mixing maximum fines with fixed payment offences
Guessing by amount instead of offence wording

lessons.title: Final Mixed Driver Licensing Test
lessons.intro: Take every Driver Licensing question together to practise without lesson hints.
lessons.memoryTrick: Identify the body, licence type, or penalty before looking at the answers.
commonMistakes: Mixing driver licence and vehicle licence rules

questions.questionText: When can compliance officers approach SPSV operators?
options: Only at the end of a shift
questions.explanation: Recorded from the verified FREE_NOW Driver Licensing answer key. Add official NTA reference during the audit pass.
questions.memoryTip: Read the key wording first: authority, licence type, card colour, renewal, pickup, or penalty.
questions.commonMistake: Do not guess from general driving knowledge; SPSV licensing has specific authority and licence rules.

questions.questionText: Where do you submit your PSV 15 application form?
options: Post it to the NTA (National Transport Authority)
Submit into the Garda station nearest to your residence (if you live outside Dublin)/Submit it to the Carriage Office (If you live in Dublin)
Submit it to the Department of Transport
